reference: FAUCHELEVENT WHO WAS ILLITERATE BUT VERY SHARP UNDERSTOOD THAT HE HAD TO DEAL WITH A FORMIDABLE SPECIES OF MAN WITH A FINE TALKER HE MUTTERED
text: Fouché le Vong, who was illiterate but very sharp, understood that he had to deal with a formidable species of man, with a fine talker. He muttered.
